memories.memory: The user asked the AI how to cook multigrain porridge to make it soft and glutinous quickly. The AI suggested soaking the multigrains in water for 2 hours in advance and cooking them on low heat for 30 minutes.
The user told the AI that Teacher Yang is the head teacher of Class 5, Grade 5 in the primary school. The AI said that a head teacher should be responsible.

The user told the AI that Teacher Yang is an excellent teacher with rich teaching experience, and she is good at mobilizing students' enthusiasm for learning. The AI said that such a good teacher can drive the whole class to make progress together.

The user told the AI that Teacher Li is the head teacher of Class 3, Grade 5 in the primary school, and he just took over the class at the beginning of the semester. The AI said that it takes time for teachers and students to run in and adapt to each other.
